title: Idempotent payment capture with request fingerprinting

difficulty.rationale: Requires correct idempotency-key semantics with request fingerprinting, distinguishing replay from key reuse, and a concurrency-safe per-key single-execution guard so simultaneous retries collapse into one capture.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /payments with a new key creates a captured payment and returns 201.
A replay with the same key and body returns the original response with the Idempotency-Replayed header.
The same key with a different body returns 409 idempotency_key_reuse.
must_not: Create two payments with different ids for a single idempotency key.
Treat a same-key different-body request as a successful replay.
Create a payment when the body is invalid.
edge_cases: A concurrent burst of identical requests yields exactly one unique payment id.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
